message:
docs(bv): clarify the comment on the robot-flag error gate

The prior wording said the spurious banner "polluted stdout-consumers" —
actually inaccurate: dispatchRobotFlagOrExit prints to ctx.StderrOrDefault().
The reason the test broke was that TestCLIFlagCompatibility drives the
binary through cmd.CombinedOutput (which merges stdout+stderr), so the
banner ended up in the captured output alongside the JSON and invalidated
it. Tighten the comment so future readers understand the actual failure
mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
